attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT	 
       COALESCE(CQ_BEHAVIOR_REWARD.BH_REWARD_CODE,'UNKNOWN') BK_PROMOTION_CD,
       COALESCE(CQ_BEHAVIOR_REWARD.BH_REWARD_VERSION,'UNKNOWN') BK_PROMOTION_REVISION_NUM_INT,
       ND.BK_DEAL_ID BK_DEAL_ID,
       COALESCE(CQ_BEHAVIOR_REWARD.CREATED_ON,CAST('3500-01-01 00:00:00' AS timestamp(0))) CREATED_DTM,
       COALESCE(CQ_BEHAVIOR_REWARD.CREATED_ON,CAST('3500-01-01' AS DATE)) DV_CREATED_DT,
       COALESCE(CQ_BEHAVIOR_REWARD.UPDATED_ON,CAST('3500-01-01 00:00:00' AS timestamp(0))) LAST_UPDATED_DTM,
       COALESCE(CQ_BEHAVIOR_REWARD.UPDATED_ON,CAST('3500-01-01' AS DATE)) DV_LAST_UPDATED_DT,
       COALESCE(CQ_BEHAVIOR_REWARD.UPDATED_BY,'UNKNOWN') SRC_RPTD_UPDATED_BY_NAME,
       COALESCE(CQ_BEHAVIOR_REWARD.CREATED_BY,'UNKNOWN') SRC_RPTD_CREATED_BY_NAME,
       'N' ALLOW_PROMOTION_CHANGE_FLG,
	     (
CASE	WHEN ( BUNDLE_TYPE is not null  
	and	 bundle_type_desc is not null) THEN 'Y' 
ELSE	'N' 
END	) IS_BUNDLE_PROMOTION_FLG,
       COALESCE(CQ_BEHAVIOR_REWARD.PROGRAM_NAME,'UNKNOWN') CHANNEL_PROGRAM_NAME,
	 --  CQ_BEHAVIOR_REWARD.DEAL_OBJECT_ID DEAL_OBJECT_ID,
	   CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) EDW_CREATE_DTM,
       USER  EDW_CREATE_USER ,
       CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) EDW_UPDATE_DTM ,
       USER EDW_UPDATE_USER ,
	   'I' ACTION_CODE,         
       '=' AS DML_TYPE,
	   COALESCE(NDQ.BK_QUOTE_NUM,'-999') BK_QUOTE_NUM,
	   COALESCE(CAST(CQ_BEHAVIOR_REWARD.BH_REWARD_ID AS BIGINT),'-999') SK_REWARD_ID_INT,
	   COALESCE(CQ_BEHAVIOR_REWARD.BH_REWARD_NAME,'UNKNOWN') REWARD_NAME,
	   COALESCE(CQ_BEHAVIOR_REWARD.IS_BH_REWARD_SELECTABLE,'N') REWARD_IS_SELECTABLE_FLG,
	   COALESCE(CQ_BEHAVIOR_REWARD.IS_BH_REWARD_SELECTED,'N') REWARD_IS_SELECTED_FLG,
	   COALESCE(CQ_BEHAVIOR_REWARD.BH_REWARD_VERSION_APPLIED,'-999') REWARD_APPLIED_VERSION_NUM,
	   COALESCE(CQ_BEHAVIOR_REWARD.IS_BH_REWARD_APPROVED,'N') REWARD_IS_APPROVED_FLG,
	  COALESCE(CQ_BEHAVIOR_REWARD.AUTO_APPROVED_FLAG,'N') REWARD_AUTO_APPROVED_FLG,
	   CAST('UNKNOWN' AS VARCHAR(50))  REWARD_STATUS_NAME
        FROM $$STGDB.ST_INT_RAW_CQ_BEHAVIOR_REWARD CQ_BEHAVIOR_REWARD INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_DEAL ND
        ON  CQ_BEHAVIOR_REWARD.DEAL_OBJECT_ID=ND.SK_DEAL_OBJECT_ID_INT AND  ND.SS_CODE <> 'CCWR' /* Added as part of CCWR filter change */
	    LEFT JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_DEAL_QUOTE NDQ
        ON NDQ.SK_QUOTE_OBJECT_ID_INT = CQ_BEHAVIOR_REWARD.QUOTE_OBJECT_ID AND NDQ.ACTIVE_FLG='Y' AND NDQ.SS_CODE <> 'CCWR' /* Added as part of CCWR filter change */
		
		UNION ALL
		
		/*OFFER REWARDS FLOW*/		
		SELECT	 
       COALESCE(OFFER_REWARD.OFR_REWARD_CODE,'UNKNOWN') BK_PROMOTION_CD,
       COALESCE(OFFER_REWARD.OFR_REWARD_VERSION,'-999') BK_PROMOTION_REVISION_NUM_INT,
       ND.BK_DEAL_ID BK_DEAL_ID,
       COALESCE(OFFER_REWARD.CREATED_ON,CAST('3500-01-01 00:00:00' AS timestamp(0))) CREATED_DTM,
       COALESCE(OFFER_REWARD.CREATED_ON,CAST('3500-01-01' AS DATE)) DV_CREATED_DT,
       COALESCE(OFFER_REWARD.UPDATED_ON,CAST('3500-01-01 00:00:00' AS timestamp(0))) LAST_UPDATED_DTM,
       COALESCE(OFFER_REWARD.UPDATED_ON,CAST('3500-01-01' AS DATE)) DV_LAST_UPDATED_DT,
       COALESCE(OFFER_REWARD.UPDATED_BY,'UNKNOWN') SRC_RPTD_UPDATED_BY_NAME,
       COALESCE(OFFER_REWARD.CREATED_BY,'UNKNOWN') SRC_RPTD_CREATED_BY_NAME,
       'N' ALLOW_PROMOTION_CHANGE_FLG,
	   '=' IS_BUNDLE_PROMOTION_FLG,
       COALESCE(OFFER_REWARD.PROGRAM_NAME,'UNKNOWN') CHANNEL_PROGRAM_NAME,
	   CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) EDW_CREATE_DTM,
       USER  EDW_CREATE_USER ,
       CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) EDW_UPDATE_DTM ,
       USER EDW_UPDATE_USER ,
	   'I' ACTION_CODE,         
       '=' AS DML_TYPE,
	   COALESCE(NDQ.BK_QUOTE_NUM,'-999') BK_QUOTE_NUM,
	   COALESCE(OFFER_REWARD.OFR_REWARD_ID,'-999') SK_REWARD_ID_INT,
	   COALESCE(OFFER_REWARD.OFR_REWARD_NAME,'UNKNOWN') REWARD_NAME,
	   '=' REWARD_IS_SELECTABLE_FLG,
	   CASE 
	   WHEN TRIM(OFFER_REWARD.IS_OFR_REWARD_SELECTED) = 'TRUE' THEN 'Y'
	   ELSE 'N' END REWARD_IS_SELECTED_FLG,
	   '-999' REWARD_APPLIED_VERSION_NUM,
	   '=' REWARD_IS_APPROVED_FLG,
	   CASE
	   WHEN OFFER_REWARD.AUTO_APPROVED = 'TRUE' THEN 'Y'
	   ELSE 'N' END REWARD_AUTO_APPROVED_FLG,
	   Coalesce (CL.LOV_VALUE,'UNKNOWN') REWARD_STATUS_NAME
	   FROM $$STGDB.ST_INT_RAW_CQ_OFFER_REWARD OFFER_REWARD INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_DEAL ND
       ON  OFFER_REWARD.DEAL_OBJECT_ID=ND.SK_DEAL_OBJECT_ID_INT AND ND.SS_CODE <> 'CCWR' /* Added as part of CCWR filter change */
	   LEFT JOIN $$ETLONLYDB.EL_CQ_LOV CL
	   ON OFFER_REWARD.STATUS = CL.LOV_INDEX
	   AND LOV_TYPE = 'BH_REWARD_STATUS' AND ACTIVE = 1
	   LEFT JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_DEAL_QUOTE NDQ
       ON NDQ.SK_QUOTE_OBJECT_ID_INT = OFFER_REWARD.QUOTE_OBJECT_ID AND NDQ.ACTIVE_FLG='Y' AND NDQ.SS_CODE <> 'CCWR' /* Added as part of CCWR filter change */

SELECT	OBJECT_ID, 
       COALESCE(CQ_BEHAVIOR_REWARD.BH_REWARD_CODE,'UNKNOWN') BK_PROMOTION_CD,
       COALESCE(CQ_BEHAVIOR_REWARD.BH_REWARD_VERSION,'UNKNOWN') BK_PROMOTION_REVISION_NUM_INT,
       CQ_BEHAVIOR_REWARD.DEAL_OBJECT_ID,
       COALESCE(CQ_BEHAVIOR_REWARD.CREATED_ON,CAST('3500-01-01 00:00:00' AS timestamp(0))) CREATED_ON,
	   COALESCE(CQ_BEHAVIOR_REWARD.PROGRAM_NAME,'UNKNOWN') CHANNEL_PROGRAM_NAME,
	   BUNDLE_TYPE,
	   bundle_type_desc,
	   COALESCE(CQ_BEHAVIOR_REWARD.CREATED_BY,'UNKNOWN') CREATED_BY,
	   COALESCE(CQ_BEHAVIOR_REWARD.UPDATED_ON,CAST('3500-01-01 00:00:00' AS timestamp(0))) UPDATED_ON,
       COALESCE(CQ_BEHAVIOR_REWARD.UPDATED_BY,'UNKNOWN') UPDATED_BY,
-999,
		CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) CREATE_DATETIME,
	   'I' ACTION_CODE,         
       'NE' AS EXCEPTION_TYPE,
	   COALESCE(CQ_BEHAVIOR_REWARD.QUOTE_OBJECT_ID,'-999') QUOTE_OBJECT_ID,
	   COALESCE(CQ_BEHAVIOR_REWARD.BH_REWARD_ID,'-999') BH_REWARD_ID,
	   COALESCE(CQ_BEHAVIOR_REWARD.BH_REWARD_NAME,'UNKNOWN') BH_REWARD_NAME,
	   COALESCE(CQ_BEHAVIOR_REWARD.IS_BH_REWARD_SELECTABLE,'N') IS_BH_REWARD_SELECTABLE,
	   COALESCE(CQ_BEHAVIOR_REWARD.IS_BH_REWARD_SELECTED,'N') IS_BH_REWARD_SELECTED,
	   COALESCE(CQ_BEHAVIOR_REWARD.BH_REWARD_VERSION_APPLIED,'-999') BH_REWARD_VERSION_APPLIED,
	   COALESCE(CQ_BEHAVIOR_REWARD.IS_BH_REWARD_APPROVED,'N') IS_BH_REWARD_APPROVED 
        FROM $$STGDB.ST_INT_RAW_CQ_BEHAVIOR_REWARD CQ_BEHAVIOR_REWARD 
		WHERE NOT EXISTS ( 
SELECT	1 
FROM	$$SLSORDVWDB.N_DEAL ND
        where  CQ_BEHAVIOR_REWARD.DEAL_OBJECT_ID=ND.SK_DEAL_OBJECT_ID_INT)
